news.headline: LTC Properties Inc. declares $0.19 monthly dividend per common share for Q3 2024. Dates: July 31, Aug 30, Sep 30.
news.summary: LTC Properties Inc. (NYSE: LTC) based in Westlake Village, California, has disclosed a monthly cash dividend of $0.19 per common share for each month in the third quarter of 2024. The dividend payment schedule is as follows: July 31, 2024, August 30, 2024, and September 30, 2024. Record dates are set for July 23, 2024, August 22, 2024, and September 20, 2024, with an equal dividend amount for each period. This initiative by LTC Properties aims to provide consistent returns to its shareholders during the specified quarter.

news.headline: Sompo appoints Christoph Müller as Country Manager, Insurance for Switzerland on July 1, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Zurich, Sompo, a prominent global provider of commercial and consumer property and casualty insurance, disclosed the selection of Christoph Müller as the new Country Manager of Insurance for Switzerland.

news.headline: Viridien: Details on total voting rights and share count released.
Datasea signs agreements for 5G AI tech and acoustics, projects $62 million in sales. Growth expected for core AI segment.
news.summary: In Beijing on July 1, 2024, Datasea Inc. (NASDAQ: DTSS), a Nevada-based company specializing in high-tech intelligent acoustics, announced agreements that are expected to drive revenue growth in its core AI-based businesses for fiscal year 2025. The company revealed that three significant agreements have been made to support this growth. Details of the agreements were not provided.

news.headline: Kelley Drye adds 2 partners and 4 special counsels, effective July 1, 2024. Exciting growth for the firm.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Kelley Drye & Warren LLP revealed changes in its leadership with the election of two new partners, Rebecca Durrant and Beth Johnson. The promotions also included four individuals being elevated to the role of special counsel, with Beth Chun among them. This move signifies a strategic decision to strengthen the firm's leadership team, increasing the total number of partners by two and special counsel by four.

news.headline: Asian hospitals use Vuzix smart glasses for surgeries: Linkou CGMH and Dalian MU's First Affiliated; Vuzix M400 smart glasses.
news.summary: Two medical facilities, Linkou Chang Gung Memorial Hospital and First Affiliated Hospital of Dalian Medical University, have utilized Vuzix M400 smart glasses in live surgeries. This innovative technology was employed in ROCHESTER, N.Y., on July 1, 2024. Vuzix® Corporation (NASDAQ: VUZI), a prominent provider of smart glasses, facilitated this initiative.

news.headline: July is the best time to install heated gutters as temperatures soar in Scottsdale, Arizona. Stay ahead of the freeze.
news.summary: In Scottsdale, Arizona, on July 1, 2024, The Brothers that just do Gutters are gearing up for winter by installing heated gutters as summer temperatures climb. This proactive home maintenance measure ensures that homes are prepared for the colder months well ahead of time. By taking this step in July, residents can rest assured that their homes will be equipped for winter's chill.

news.headline: LLS adds 5 new board members incl. hematologists, NFL vet, ops & comm execs; all-woman executive committee.
news.summary: The Leukemia & Lymphoma Society (LLS) has appointed five new members to its board of directors, starting July 1, 2024. This diverse group includes professionals from various backgrounds such as hematologists, a former NFL player, and executives in operations and communications. Additionally, an all-woman executive committee has been established as part of this announcement. This development marks a significant change in the composition of the board, bringing fresh perspectives and expertise to the organization.

news.headline: Dominate 365™ boosts online presence for podiatrists, merges services into program to aid them.
news.summary: In Metuchen, New Jersey, on July 1, 2024, Podiatry Content Connection (PCC) announced that they have been a prominent figure in providing digital content and marketing solutions for podiatry practices globally starting from 2013. PCC recently amalgamated their top 3 services to create a comprehensive program aimed at aiding podiatrists in enhancing their practices.

news.headline: Kimberly A. Fields is the new President and CEO of ATI Inc. with Robert S. Wetherbee as Executive Chairman.
news.summary: In an anticipated leadership move on July 1, 2024, Kimberly A. Fields has assumed the roles of President and CEO at ATI Inc. [NYSE: ATI], taking over from Robert S. "Bob" Wetherbee, who has now transitioned into the position of Executive Chairman. Prior to her new roles, Fields had been serving in a different capacity at ATI.

news.headline: Kinetic commits $250,000 for fiber upgrade in tornado-ravaged Greenfield, Iowa, providing 28,500 feet of new fiber in 320 locations.
news.summary: Following a devastating tornado on May 21, 2024, in Adair County, the community faces significant challenges in rebuilding. In a bid to aid the recovery process, Kinetic has announced a $250,000 investment to restore the damaged communications infrastructure by implementing a buried fiber optic solution. This initiative will involve installing over 28,500 feet (approximately 5.4 miles) of new fiber to serve more than 320 locations in Greenfield. Remarkably, this project will be fully funded by Kinetic, requiring no financial contribution from the state, county, Greenfield residents, or Kinetic customers.

news.headline: SYLA Solar merges with SYLA Biotech Corporation on July 1st, 2024; both based in Shibuya-ku, Tokyo.
news.summary: On July 01, 2024, TOKYO - SYLA Solar Co., Ltd. based in Nagoya, Aichi, headed by CEO Takeshi Fuchiwaki, merged with SYLA Biotech Corporation of Shibuya-ku, Tokyo, led by CEO Makoto Ariki. This move integrates the two entities under SYLA Solar, a subsidiary of SYLA Technologies Co., Ltd. headquartered in Shibuya-ku, Tokyo and presided over by CEO Hiroyuki Sugimoto, listed on NASDAQ as “SYT”. SYLA Solar is known for operating Japan's largest membership real estate crowdfunding platform called Rimawari-kun.

news.headline: Global Aseptic Packaging Market projected to reach USD 179.19 Billion by 2033 with a 10.76% CAGR; Current value at USD 64.49 Billion in 2023. Growth driven by demand in food, pharmaceuticals, healthcare sectors.
news.summary: The global Aseptic Packaging Market is forecasted to have a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of approximately 10.76% during the period 2024 to 2033. The market size was around USD 64.49 billion in 2023 and is expected to reach USD 71.43 billion in 2024, with a projected market size of approximately USD 179.19 billion by 2033. Aseptic packaging is highlighted for its role in safeguarding against microbial contamination in the packaging process and has significant demand in industries like food and beverage, pharmaceuticals, and healthcare. The market is segmented by packaging type (Cartons, Bottles, Pouches, Bags), technology (Fillers, Sealing Machines, Sterilization Equipment, Packaging Materials), material type (Paperboard, Plastics, Metals, Glass), and end-user industry. Factors driving market growth include the need for pharmaceutical packaging, convenience in packaged foods and beverages, urbanization trends, and advancements in technology leading to increased adoption of aseptic packaging.

news.headline: EU finds Meta's ad-free subscription service violates competition law for forcing users to pay or share personal data for ads.
news.summary: Officials stated that the subscription platform launched in the previous year operates on a "pay or agree" model to gather personal information and enhance advertising efforts.

news.headline: Director's statement issued today revealed company's Q3 revenue up 20% YoY, totaling $5.6 million.
There is an imbalance in the MOO market, with 500 jobs lost and 200 businesses closed due to economic downturn.
Trump Media & Technology Group Corp joins Russell 1000 and Russell 3000 Indexes after reconstitution, effective June 28, 2024.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in Sarasota, Florida, Trump Media & Technology Group Corp (NASDAQ: DJT) disclosed that it had been chosen for inclusion in the Russell 1000 and Russell 3000 Indexes during the 2024 annual reconstitution. Operator of Truth Social, a platform associated with President Donald J. Trump, the Company's inclusion became effective after the U.S. market closed on June 28, 2024. This move signifies a notable achievement for TMTG within the financial sector.

news.headline: Global black truffles market valued at $298.32M in 2023, projected to reach $515.09M by 2029 with CAGR of 9.53% - ResearchAndMarkets.com.
news.summary: The market research report titled "Global Black Truffles Market: Analysis of Conventional and Organic Categories, Applications, End Uses, Regions - Size, Trends, and Forecast to 2029" is now available on ResearchAndMarkets.com. With a value of US$298.32 million in 2023, the global black truffles market is projected to reach US$515.09 million by 2029, showcasing a growth rate (CAGR) of 9.53% during 2024-2029. The industry is witnessing a promising surge in value and is anticipated to continue on this growth trajectory in the upcoming years.

news.headline: Vitalik Buterin says lowering the 32 ETH requirement will make Ethereum more home staking friendly, ensuring decentralization.
news.summary: In numerous polls conducted, the consistent finding is that the top priority for enhancing home staking accessibility is to decrease the current 32 ETH threshold, as highlighted by Buterin.

news.headline: Withum announces 20 new partners in their 2024 New Partner Class, boosting corporate leadership.
news.summary: In Princeton, New Jersey on July 1, 2024, Withum has revealed its 2024 New Partner Class, including 20 team members from various offices across the country. These new partners will contribute to the diverse corporate leadership team at the firm. This announcement demonstrates the growth and advancement opportunities within Withum as they continue to expand their leadership.

news.headline: DGS receives 200th patent for AI in network optimization. Leader in RF tech.
news.summary: Tysons, Virginia - On July 1, 2024, Digital Global Systems (DGS), a pioneer in radio frequency (RF) environmental awareness technology, achieved a significant milestone by receiving its 200th patent from the United States Patent and Trademark Office. This patent further bolsters DGS's position as a front-runner in the development of advanced spectrum technology.

news.headline: Eric Chack appointed EVP – Operations at Enerpac Tool Group effective July 22, responsible for global operations.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, Enerpac Tool Group Corp shared news that Eric Chack is set to become the EVP – Operations starting July 22. In this role, he will oversee all global operations of Enerpac, covering areas such as manufacturing, procurement, logistics, continuous improvement, quality, and reliability. Reporting directly to Enerpac Tool Group's President & CEO, Paul Sternlieb, Chack will also join the executive leadership team. This update came from a press release and the company is listed on NYSE as EPAC.

news.headline: Novo Nordisk A/S in Denmark started a share repurchase program worth up to DKK 20 billion for 12 months starting Feb 2024.
news.summary: In Denmark's Bagsværd on July 1, 2024, Novo Nordisk commenced a share repurchase initiative in compliance with European Parliament and Council Regulation No 596/2014 (MAR) and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2016/1052. The program is a component of a larger share repurchase plan totaling DKK 20 billion, set to unfold over a year starting February 6, 2024.

news.headline: Yard Force releases a powerful new Pressure Washer Electric Powered - 2000 PSI 2.3 GPM on Amazon, KENNESAW, Ga.
news.summary: In Kennesaw, Georgia, Yard Force, a top player in outdoor cleaning solutions, has launched the Electric Powered Pressure Washer with 2000 PSI and 2.3 GPM. This dynamic washer is now for sale on Amazon, aimed at simplifying and enhancing outdoor cleaning chores. The high-pressure washer boasts a sturdy 13-Amp/1800-watt motor that produces a maximum of 2000 PSI and 1.5 GPM water flow, providing powerful cleaning capabilities.

news.headline: New Telegram game 'Catizen' is gaining popularity, where players merge cats to boost cafe earnings. It's more complex than other games.
news.summary: Catizen, the newest sensation on Telegram, has captured the attention of many players. In this game, users are tasked with combining different cats to boost their cat café earnings. The game offers a unique and engaging experience compared to other similar games currently available.

news.headline: Knightvest Capital gains agility with new fund, acquires Encore Apartments in Plano, North Texas as first investment.
news.summary: In its continued growth journey, the company has secured a new fund that will enhance its ability to seize opportunities and generate high returns. The acquisition of Encore Apartments in Plano represents the initial investment from this fund, highlighting the company's commitment to expansion. This move signifies a significant step forward for Knightvest, demonstrating its focus on strategic investments to drive success.

news.headline: Vetster offers telemedicine to 12.5 million Florida pet owners, providing diagnosis, treatment plans, and prescriptions online.
news.summary: In a significant announcement today, Vetster, a leading veterinary telehealth platform, stated that 12.5 million pet owners in Florida now have access to online consultations, treatment plans, and prescriptions provided by top-rated veterinarians. Apart from virtual video appointments, pet owners can opt for VetsterRx, fulfilled by PetMedsⓇ, allowing them to receive their prescribed medications at home or from a nearby human pharmacy. This development marks a milestone for pet care in Florida.

news.headline: Merit Medical acquires EndoGastric Solutions for $105 million, enhancing its healthcare technology portfolio. EsophyX Z+ device treats GERD.
news.summary: In South Jordan, Utah on July 01, 2024, Merit Medical Systems, Inc., a prominent healthcare technology company traded on NASDAQ under MMSI, disclosed the finalization of an asset purchase deal with EndoGastric Solutions, Inc. The agreement involved a sum of around $105 million in cash. EndoGastric Solutions’ EsophyX® Z+ device serves as an enduring, minimally invasive non-pharmacological remedy for individuals afflicted by GERD, providing a significant advancement in treatment options for these patients.

news.headline: UFP Technologies (Nasdaq: UFPT) acquires AJR Enterprises, LLC, specializing in developing and manufacturing safe patient handling systems. Headquarters in St. Charles, Illinois with manufacturing in the Dominican Republic.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, UFP Technologies, Inc. revealed the acquisition of AJR Enterprises, LLC, a company based in St. Charles, Illinois, with operations also in the Dominican Republic. UFP Technologies, listed as Nasdaq: UFPT, specializes in designing and producing tailored solutions for medical devices, sterile packaging, and various other highly engineered custom products. AJR Enterprises specializes in creating single-use safe patient handling systems.

news.headline: California Resources Corporation (CRC) completes merger with Aera Energy, LLC. Shareholder approval secured. Welcome Aera's experienced team.
news.summary: In Long Beach, California, California Resources Corporation (NYSE: CRC) has finalized an all-stock merger with Aera Energy, LLC. This merger was officially approved by CRC shareholders during a special meeting on June 26, 2024. Shareholders voted positively for the issuance of shares, essential for sealing the deal between CRC and Aera. The collaboration brings together two significant players in the energy sector, leveraging the expertise and successful history of Aera's team, enhancing CRC's position in the market.

news.headline: Iberdrola reports over 1,800 biodiversity actions in its 2024 report. #CleanEnergy.
news.summary: A report released by Iberdrola reveals that the company has implemented over 1,800 biodiversity actions as part of their commitment to clean energy. The actions are outlined in their 2024 report, emphasizing their dedication to environmental conservation. This initiative showcases Iberdrola's proactive approach towards promoting sustainability and protecting biodiversity.

news.headline: Craveworthy Brands opens Craveworthy Kitchen at Hayden Hall in Chicago, accelerating growth in culinary industry.
news.summary: Craveworthy Brands continues to experience rapid growth in the culinary industry through strategic expansion efforts. Based in Chicago, the innovative fast-casual restaurant platform company is known for popular concepts like BD's Mongolian Grill, Dirty Dough, and Flat Top Grill. This upward trajectory was solidified on July 1, 2024, with the announcement of key developments that further establish the company as a significant player in the market. The company's expansion initiatives have resulted in a notable increase in revenue and brand recognition, with an impressive number of new locations opened and plans for continued growth in the coming years.

news.headline: Belveron Partners and Conifer Realty rank #6 for affordable housing ownership. Recognized for development/acquisition in 2023. NY, Jul 1, 2024.
news.summary: Belveron-Conifer was acknowledged for its extensive development and acquisition efforts in 2023. The New York-based investment firm, Belveron Partners, received recognition for its work in affordable and workforce housing. This privately-held company is committed to creating, preserving, and revitalizing such housing options. The achievements of Belveron-Conifer in 2023 were notable, showcasing the firm's dedication to its mission.

news.headline: NYS approved $3.1M for Montefiore Einstein's Pediatric Mental Health Center, addressing needs in the Bronx.
news.summary: A grant totaling $3.1 million has been secured from the NYS Office of Mental Health to bolster support for a project in the Bronx. This new unit aims to tackle the unmet behavioral and mental health requirements of children and adolescents in the area. The initiative, announced on July 1, 2024, is intended to serve as a blueprint for addressing these crucial needs.

news.headline: Grasons Estate Sales offers unique summer treasures for collectors across the nation, featuring rare antiques and memorabilia.
news.summary: In July 2024, in Scottsdale, Arizona, Grasons, a prominent estate sale management company, is welcoming collectors and treasure hunters to peruse a wide selection of summer-themed items at their estate sales across the country. The collection includes a variety of unique pieces ranging from rare antiques to nostalgic memorabilia.

news.headline: JTV launches Bella Luce Italia collection available on JTV and JTV.com, inspired by Italian craftsmanship.
news.summary: Bella Luce Italia™, a blend of traditional Italian craftsmanship and contemporary luxury, can now be found on JTV and JTV.com. The renowned jewelry retailer and e-commerce platform based in Knoxville, Tenn., announced this exciting partnership on July 1, 2024. This collaboration brings the elegance of Italian design to a wide audience through the national broadcast network and online store. This development opens up new avenues for customers to explore and purchase exquisite pieces, reflecting the brand's commitment to quality and style.

news.headline: MultiSafepay, Amsterdam-based payment provider, acquired by Ant International, aims to enhance digital payments in Europe.
news.summary: In a recent announcement, Amsterdam's payment service provider MultiSafepay (MSP) and Antom global merchant payment services from Singapore revealed a significant development. MultiSafepay has now become a fully-owned subsidiary of Ant International. This move aims to enhance the promotion of seamless and secure payment solutions as well as digitization services for businesses, with a particular focus on small and medium enterprises. The collaboration between MultiSafepay and Antom seeks to deliver efficient and accessible services in the realm of digital transactions.

news.headline: DeWitt Attorneys Frost and Schmid recognized as 2023 North Star Lawyers Pro Bono All-Stars for providing 50+ hours of legal aid.
news.summary: DeWitt LLP, a law firm based in Minneapolis, revealed on July 1, 2024, that two of its attorneys, namely R. Leigh Frost and Lauri Ann Schmid, were honored by the Minnesota State Bar Association (MSBA) for their outstanding contributions. The MSBA recognized them as the 2023 "North Star Lawyers Pro Bono All-Stars" for their exceptional dedication to pro bono legal services. Both attorneys committed over 50 hours each to serving clients in need of legal assistance.

news.headline: Zenni Optical partners with USA Volleyball and 2024 Olympic Beach Volleyball team members Taryn Kloth and Kristen Nuss to launch sports performance eyewear for athletes.
news.summary: Zenni Optical, a premier online eyewear retailer, has unveiled their latest Sports Performance RX & Non-RX Sunglasses aimed at providing exceptional safety, performance, and style for athletes. The company, based in Novato, California, revealed this new product line on July 1, 2024. In a significant move, Zenni Optical has forged a partnership with USA Volleyball. This collaboration is set to enhance the brand's presence and further solidify its position as the top choice for sports eyewear.

news.headline: DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund declares $0.11 per share distribution for July 2024. Traded on NYSE under symbol DSL.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, on July 1, 2024, the DoubleLine Income Solutions Fund, listed on the NYSE as DSL, announced a monthly distribution of $0.11 per share for July 2024. The distribution is subject to specific conditions.

news.headline: Get ready for a sizzling deal from Fazoli's - $4 pastas now available for a limited time! Don't miss out on this offer.
news.summary: In recent updates, it has been reported that the number of new COVID-19 cases has surged to over 10,000 in the past 24 hours. This significant increase brings the total number of confirmed cases in the country to more than 250,000. In response to the spike in cases, authorities have announced stricter guidelines and lockdown measures in heavily affected regions. Health officials are expressing concerns over the strain this surge is placing on the healthcare system, with hospitals now operating at 90% capacity. The government is urging the public to adhere to safety protocols and get vaccinated to help curb the spread of the virus.

news.headline: Alliance Trust PLC reports a net asset value of £725 million.
news.summary: A recent report revealed that the unemployment rate in the United States increased to 5.2% in the month of August. This rise was unexpected as economists had predicted a decrease to 4.9%. Additionally, the number of new jobs added to the economy was lower than anticipated, with only 235,000 jobs created compared to the expected 720,000. This unexpected slowdown is causing concern among policymakers and analysts about the trajectory of the economic recovery. The disappointing performance in the job market is seen as a potential hurdle to overall economic growth in the coming months.

news.headline: DoubleLine Opportunistic Credit Fund (NYSE: DBL) declares $0.11 per share distribution for July 2024.
news.summary: In the week of July 1, 2024, the DoubleLine Opportunistic Credit Fund, listed on the NYSE as DBL, announced a monthly distribution of $0.11 per share for July 2024. This distribution is pending...

news.headline: BLN Software rebrands as Bridge Loan Network, unveiling a new strategy on July 1, 2024, marking a bold change.
news.summary: A tech company based in VERNON, Conn., BLN Software, previously named Bridge Loan Network, recently revealed a new brand identity marking a major milestone in the company's evolution within the real estate software industry. The rebranding initiative signifies a strategic move and sets the company on a new trajectory. This news was shared on July 1, 2024, through a PRNewswire press release.

news.headline: Mathnasium introduces 'Ace Your Dreams: Mathnasium x Jagger Eaton Scholarship' with $2,000 prize for students.
news.summary: A supplemental education franchise focusing solely on math has formed a partnership with Jagger Eaton, a former Mathnasium student who is now a U.S. Olympic skateboarder and world champion. Eaton credits the program for providing him with the essential skills to excel in math and life. The collaboration will offer prizes such as a $2,000 scholarship and signed memorabilia.

news.headline: KeyBank funds $2M in Home Buyer Credits, aiding 442 clients in achieving homeownership, emphasizing affordability.
news.summary: KeyBank's recent funding achievement exemplifies its dedication to promoting affordable and sustainable homeownership for all individuals. On July 1, 2024, KeyBank revealed that it has successfully provided over $2 million in KeyBank Home Buyer CreditsSMi, benefiting 442 clients in realizing their aspirations of owning a home.

news.headline: Zum EV Program Manager Pallav Prakash named 2024 School Transportation News Innovator for electric bus conversion.
news.summary: Dr. Pallav Prakash, the EV Program Manager at Zūm, based in Redwood City, California, was recently recognized as the 2024 Innovator of the Year by Student Transportation. He was honored for his successful implementation of electric school bus conversion utilizing Vehicle-to-Grid technology. This achievement highlights Dr. Prakash's expertise in clean energy solutions.

news.headline: DoubleLine Yield Opportunities Fund (NYSE: DLY) declares $0.1167 per share distribution for July 2024.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida on July 1, 2024, the DoubleLine Yield Opportunities Fund (traded as DLY on NYSE) announced a distribution of $0.1167 per share for July 2024. This distribution is subject to certain conditions.

news.headline: OFF!® Brand and The Weather Channel launch new In-App Mosquito Forecast, providing local OFF!Cast easily.
news.summary: A recently announced collaboration is focusing on utilizing weather data and information to provide individuals with their local OFF!Cast Mosquito Forecast™ as conveniently as they receive their local weather forecast. This partnership was solidified between companies based in Atlanta and Racine, Wisconsin, and was unveiled on July 1, 2024, as the summer season approaches with increased temperatures and humidity. The goal is to ensure users are equipped with essential insights and preparations as they anticipate the changing conditions ahead.

news.headline: Shelley Isaacson named new Board Chair of SeriousFun Children's Network, founded by Paul Newman. Leading global medical camps.
news.summary: On July 1, 2024, in NORWALK, Connecticut, Shelley Isaacson was warmly welcomed by the Board of Directors of SeriousFun Children's Network. This global organization, established by renowned actor and philanthropist Paul Newman, focuses on providing support to children through medical specialty camps. SeriousFun stands out as the primary network of such camps, offering vital services to a significant number of children worldwide.
